title: Sealapack Freezer Bags, Ready To Use Kitchen Essential, Resealable Pack Of 20 Bags
features: FRUIT SMOOTHIE: Sealapack Food and Freezer Bags, perfect for storing chopped fresh fruit, dividing larger frozen fruit bags for efficient freezer storage use, ready to prepare a healthy smoothie. Freeze foods as soon as possible after purchase and always before the use by date

TIME SAVING: Prepare chopped fresh ingredients you regularly use, such as chopped onions and garlic, carrots and leeks, add to a pouch and freeze. When starting to cook, simply use a pouch from the freezer to get ahead when you are short on time. Store fresh ingredients in the fridge

KITCHEN ESSENTIAL: Keep the bags handy in a kitchen drawer for the occasions when you have overripe fruit, excess vegetables or tasty leftovers you need to save. Write the date of freezing on the bags and the contents to easily rotate food in the freezer
RESEALABLE: Easy to securely seal, pull open and remove required amount and simply reseal returning the bag to the fridge or freezer
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: PACK OF 20 BAGS
